/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -std=c++11 -fPIC -Wno-deprecated-declarations -Wno-unused-variable -DOPENCV -std=c++11 -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libtkDNN.so -o libtkDNN.so CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Activation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/BoundingBox.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/CenternetDetection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Conv2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/DarknetParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/DeformConv2d.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Dense.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Flatten.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Int8BatchStream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Int8Calibrator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/LSTM.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/LayerWgs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/MobilenetDetection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/MulAdd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/NetworkRT.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/NetworkViz.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Pooling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Region.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Reorg.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Reshape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Route.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Shortcut.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Softmax.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Upsample.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Yolo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/Yolo3Detection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/evaluation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tkDNN.dir/src/utils.cpp.o   -L/usr/local/TensorRT-7.2.1.6/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/TensorRT-7.2.1.6/lib:/home/alex/Projects/tkDNN-python/cmake-build-debug:/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/usr/local/lib: libkernels.so /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/local/lib/libopencv_gapi.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_highgui.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_ml.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_objdetect.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/cuda/lib64/libcudadevrt.a /usr/local/lib/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_calib3d.so.4.4.0 /usr/local/lib/libopencv_features2d.so.4.4.0
